subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast hearkened to the call and art drawn unto the Kingdom of the Most High! The pillars of polytheism have been shaken by the effulgence of lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمع الندا و انجذب الی الملکوت الاعلی قد تزلزل ارکان الشرک من سطوع انوار
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @The Holy Spirit, @firmness in the Covenant
